name: codex-sessions
title: Codex Sessions
description: Fuzzy-find Codex sessions and open projects in Codex Desktop
author: jomatsu

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.title: Search Codex Sessions
commands.description: Search all local Codex threads and open them in Codex Desktop or the terminal

commands.name: open-project
commands.title: Open Codex Project
commands.description: Open a project folder in Codex Desktop, ranked by how often you use it

preferences.name: codexCliPath
preferences.title: Codex CLI Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the codex binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal for Resume
preferences.description: Terminal application used by Resume in Terminal
